incident: Permit2 unlimited or long expiry: Permit2 PermitSingle or PermitBatch signed with amount >= 2^159 (effectively unlimited)
label: H1_positive

incident: Permit2 unlimited or long expiry: Permit2 expiration timestamp set more than 30 days from signing time
label: H1_positive

incident: Permit2 unlimited or long expiry: Permit2 spender address is not in any known protocol registry or verified contract list
label: H1_positive

incident: Permit2 unlimited or long expiry: User followed recommendation -- Set Permit2 amount to the exact transfer value and expiration to 1 hour
label: H1_clean

incident: EIP-712 typed data encoding token transfer: EIP-712 typed data contains fields matching token transfer patterns (recipient, amount, token address)
label: H2_positive

incident: EIP-712 typed data encoding token transfer: EIP-712 typed data encodes an approval or permit (spender, value, deadline fields)
label: H2_positive

incident: EIP-712 typed data encoding token transfer: dApp UI description does not match the decoded EIP-712 payload semantics (e.g., UI says 'login' but payload is a permit)
label: H2_positive

incident: EIP-712 typed data encoding token transfer: User followed recommendation -- Decode and display the full EIP-712 typed data in human-readable form before signing, highlighting any transfer/approval semantics
label: H2_clean

incident: setApprovalForAll to unknown operator: Transaction or signed message invokes setApprovalForAll with approved=true
label: H3_positive

incident: setApprovalForAll to unknown operator: Operator address is not a verified marketplace (OpenSea, Blur, LooksRare) or known protocol
label: H3_positive

incident: setApprovalForAll to unknown operator: Operator contract deployed within last 48 hours
label: H3_positive

incident: setApprovalForAll to unknown operator: User followed recommendation -- Check operator address against known marketplace and protocol registries before signing
label: H3_clean

incident: Signature from unverified dApp origin: dApp domain not found in any curated protocol directory (DeFi Llama, Etherscan dApp list)
label: H4_positive

incident: Signature from unverified dApp origin: Domain is visually similar to a known protocol domain (e.g., uniswap.com vs un1swap.com)
label: H4_positive

incident: Signature from unverified dApp origin: Domain registered within last 30 days (WHOIS data)
label: H4_positive

incident: Signature from unverified dApp origin: User followed recommendation -- Check dApp origin against curated allowlist of known protocol domains before signing
label: H4_clean

incident: Batch permit (multiple tokens): Permit2 PermitBatch signed with 2+ token approvals in a single message
label: H5_positive

incident: Batch permit (multiple tokens): Combined value of all tokens in the batch exceeds $1000
label: H5_positive

incident: Batch permit (multiple tokens): Batch includes both high-value and low-value tokens (drainer sweeping all holdings)
label: H5_positive

incident: Batch permit (multiple tokens): User followed recommendation -- Sign individual permits for each token instead of a single batch, reviewing each one
label: H5_clean

incident: Seaport order below market price: Seaport order lists NFT at <50% of collection floor price
label: H6_positive

incident: Seaport order below market price: Seaport order consideration (payment) is <0.001 ETH for an asset with known value
label: H6_positive

incident: Seaport order below market price: Seaport order bundles multiple valuable assets with total consideration far below combined value
label: H6_positive

incident: Seaport order below market price: User followed recommendation -- Fetch current floor price and recent sales data before signing any Seaport listing order
label: H6_clean
